title: Grentho
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Grentho |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Grentho''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a bodyguard for [[8t88/Legends|8t88]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== Grentho was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a bodyguard for the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] information broker [[8t88/Legends|8t88]]. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], 8t88 was hired by [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] to find the location of the Force nexus called the [[Valley of the Jedi]] and soon discovered a [[Hologram disc/Legends|Holodisc]] belonging to the late [[Moisture farm/Legends|farmer]] [[Morgan Katarn]]. Unable to decipher it himself, the droid arranged a meeting on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta's]] moon of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] with Morgan's son, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Kyle Katarn]], hoping that he would agree to access it. During the meeting at the [[Rimmer's Rest/Legends|Rimmer's Rest]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], Katarn refused and 8t88 ordered several hired thugs to kill him and 88 left.''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' Grentho and another [[Gender/Legends|female]] bodyguard joined 88 on his way to the [[Launch Deck Three]] where a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was bound to collect them. After passing a circular door, the trio had to stop as a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guard was herding a band of [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] in front of them. While waiting, Grentho noticed a tiny, [[Scorpion/Legends|scorpion]]-shaped [[tracker droid]] on the droid's leg; at first the droid didn't let him speak, having ordered him to be silent, contstantly interrupting him until he insisted and pointed out that something was attached on him. While resisting at first, he pried it off and attempted to run away but Grentho caught it with his fingers and notified 88. Seeing it, 88 sensed that it broadcast a signal,[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] and ordered him to destroy it immediately, understanding that it was put earlier on him by Katarn, who wouldn't be far behind. That moment the ''[[Furious (Lambda-class)|Furious]]'' arrived to pick him up, and to save time, 88 ordered [[Unidentified pilot (Furious)|the pilot]] not to land the shuttle but just lower the ramp. Indeed, Kyle Katarn announced his presence right after, and the two bodyguards were reaching for their weapons, as Katarn and the droid exchanged taunts; before they could react, Katarn shot his [[Bryar pistol]], dismembering the droid, its mechanical arm holding the disk falling over the edge of the platform. A [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] helped the droid in as the ramp lifted. The bodyguards and Katarn exchanged a few shots; Katarn's penetrated Grentho's chest, who fell over with his arms open, as if expecting ahug. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Hey, boss, I..."
"Grentho, do you have a brain?"
"Yea, but..."
"Does it function, is it possible to perform a diagnostic on a biological?"
"Sure, but boss..."
"Did you not hear me tell you to be silent?"
"But... boss there is something attached to your leg!"
"There is? Please remove it, Grentho...|Grentho attempting to warn 8t88 about Katarn's tracker|}} Grentho was a very muscular man and was considered one of the brightest 8t88's thugs. He had an addiction to [[nic-i-tain]], as a result of which, his forefinger became stained. His thumb was also heavily callused. ==Behind the scenes== In the [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'', Grentho was voiced by [[Tim Glovatsky]]. The text above follows the novelization where Grentho accompanies 8t88 with a female bodyguard; when Katarn appears, he shoots the droid's arm off before the two bodyguards are able to react. In the audio adaptation, only Grentho appears without mention of the other bodyguard; 88 orders Grentho to delay Katarn while the droid approaches the landing platform expecting the shuttle. Some blaster shots are heard being exchanged before the arrival of the shuttle, and then Katarn shoots off the droid's arm. In the original game, Katarn confronts 88 while he is about to board the shuttle, and no bodyguards appear.''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}} *[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bodyguards]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
